channel.title: Comments for page "SCP Artwork Hub"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "SCP Artwork Hub"

item.title: Proposal for Improvement
item.content:encoded:
I think implementing the image zoom components (hover enlargement, click and hold fullscreen) which are used in SCP-049's rewrite (which is where I also stumbled across them) on this hub page could pose an improvement.
Thank you!

item.title: Do you think I have enough art for an Art page?
item.content:encoded: here it is. It is a WIP I need to draw the third phase and misc. animations like death animations & other researchers for phase two.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Art pages are tagged "artwork", not "tale".

The page creation process is typically the same though.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: So how would I go about making an art page? Do I just post it as posting a tale or is there another harder process?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Is there an artwork page here that you can just submit your art?

There is no automatic artwork page generator.

If you're interested in creating an artwork page, it's usually a good idea to first post some examples of your artwork in the Fan Work subforum, so you can gauge audience reaction. We have had artwork pages deleted before due to the quality of the artwork being too low.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Is there an artwork page here that you can just submit your art? I cant seem to find one..

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Thank you.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I'm planning on my art page just being two sides, one side is the art I like looking at that I made and the other side is the art I hate looking at that I made.

You can try setting up a sandbox page with some of the artwork you want to display, and then go to Drafts/Critiques or the chatroom to see what the audience response is. If you get enough people telling you that they'd upvote, that should be a good enough indication that the art page will be well-received.

Artwork pages are generally held to the same standard as other pages; if it stays above -10, it stays on the site.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
it doesn't look that good but some of it has gotten praise and people do enjoy it.

i think the later pieces of work are much better.

I'm planning on my art page just being two sides, one side is the art I like looking at that I made and the other side is the art I hate looking at that I made.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: If you're going to ask about an art page, please provide some links to the art you plan on showcasing, rather than just asking without anything to show.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Can I make an art page? I want permission before I do.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: There's an SCP meme subreddit that's surprisingly active: https://www.reddit.com/r/DankMemesFromSite19/

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Are memes art? If not, where could I possibly share any hilarious SCP memes that I make?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Oh look at this! All pretty and reformated. I want in on this, yes!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Feels like this should be tagged as artwork now! :P

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Also, artists, keep in mind that there's no limit on getting back to me with your showcase information. If you see this page up, check your PMs, and realize you forgot to reply to me last week, don't sweat it! You can still be added.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
So this page has received a major update as you can tell. Cleaned and repurposed as a master hub for artwork.

A very special thanks to Cyantreuse who created the banner graphic and also helped organize the showcase.

This page is for all our artists. Thank you.

So if you are an artist and want to be added, please contact myself or Cyan. You'll need to have an artwork hub on the wiki, a showcase piece, and a blurb about that piece and what inspires you.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I just wanna put this discovery here, since it should be somewhere and this seems most appropriate. I don't know if this is common knowledge or not.
The vinesauce rom corruptor also works on image, video or audio files. I assume txt. works too.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: The picture has been deleted from this page. If the owner is looking for it, it can be found in the Files of this page.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Alright, done deal. :3

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I don't see why not.

And I recall that picture being from a deleted article. If a mod could delete it or something, that'd be nice.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Oh, so it isn't… So may I have the privilege? It'd pretty much be the same thing but the thing about the pass'd be removed.

E: Also, it looks like someone uploaded a picture of a woman in a hospital bed to this page.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: That would be nice. You don't need a password to add things anymore, though.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
So… Would it be at all possible to reformat this page? The only times I come over here is for the link to the Visual Records, but every time I do, I have to go through that huge mass of red text for a similarly red link. Even if there're arrows pointed at it, it's just a bother to find.

Couldn't we just have it be all like:

[+] Show
[-] Close

The SCP Foundation Visual Records is now off-site!

If you want to participate in the visual records process, or simply need SCP Fuel, feel free to click on the link below and join. PM Roget for the password.

» SCP Foundation Visual Records «

item.title: People looking at recent posts.
item.content:encoded: I'd like anyone interested in scpfuel/visual records to check out the little header announcement thing I've put up on this page. It's all about the new way we'll be doing the scp picture page.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I'm PM one of the admins first, maybe? Pictures that are linked through the wiki take up space.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I've been wondering this as well.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: So… am I able to make my own page of SCPFuel? Because I have a grand total of 58 photos I've been storing…

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Uploaded a good batch from Picture is Unrelated. Everyone enjoy. :)

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: There's not one, really.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: What's the procedure for claiming/using one of the SCPFuel images?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: That'd be me, yeh, but anyone can add to them. Just log into photobucket using the account name "SCPfuel2" and password "123456" and upload to your heart's content!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Hey, Yoric — or whoever's officially running SCPfuel — I've got some beautifully bizarre photos for the Fuelbuckets. Shall I drop you a link to upload them, or what?
